ddls:
CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "pubmed_id" INTEGER /* PubMed ID of the study publication */,
  "first_author" TEXT /* First author of the study */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the study was published */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the study was published */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link to the study publication */,
  "study_title" TEXT /* Title of the study */,
  "study_type" TEXT /* Type of the study (e.g., case-control, cohort) */,
  "study_design" TEXT /* Design of the study (e.g., cross-sectional, longitudinal) */,
  "study_population" TEXT /* Population being studied (e.g., human, animal) */,
  "study participant_count" INTEGER /* Number of participants in the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "chromosome_id" INTEGER /* Chromosome ID of the gene */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the gene */,
  "gene_type" TEXT /* Type of the gene (e.g., protein-coding, non-coding) */,
  "gene_description" TEXT /* Description of the gene */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variant */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study that identified the variant */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene associated with the variant */,
  "strongest_snp_risk_allele" TEXT /* Strongest SNP-risk allele associated with the variant */,
  "snp_id_current" INTEGER /* Current SNP ID */,
  "risk_allele_frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the risk allele in the population */,
  "variant_type" TEXT /* Type of the variant (e.g., SNP, CNV) */,
  "variant_description" TEXT /* Description of the variant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variants_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variants_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "populations" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study that includes the population */,
  "initial_sample_size" INTEGER /* Initial sample size of the population */,
  "replication_sample_size" INTEGER /* Replication sample size of the population */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the population is located */,
  "population_description" TEXT /* Description of the population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_populations_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genotyping_technology" (
  "genotyping_technology_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genotyping technology */,
  "genotyping_technology_name" TEXT /* Name of the genotyping technology */,
  "genotyping_technology_description" TEXT /* Description of the genotyping technology */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genotyping_technology_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study that used the platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the platform */,
  "snps_passing_qc" INTEGER /* Number of SNPs that passed QC */,
  "platform_description" TEXT /* Description of the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_platforms_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "associations" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study that identified the association */,
  "mapped_trait" TEXT /* Mapped trait of the association */,
  "mapped_trait_uri" TEXT /* Mapped trait URI of the association */,
  "study_accession" TEXT /* Study accession of the association */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value of the association */,
  "odds_ratio_or_beta" REAL /* Odds ratio or beta of the association */,
  "association_description" TEXT /* Description of the association */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_associations_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cnvs" (
  "cnv_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CNV */,
  "association_id" INTEGER /* ID of the association that includes the CNV */,
  "cnv_name" TEXT /* Name of the CNV */,
  "cnv_description" TEXT /* Description of the CNV */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cnv_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cnvs_association_id FOREIGN KEY ("association_id") REFERENCES associations ("association_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "upstream_genes" (
  "upstream_gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each upstream gene */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variant that includes the upstream gene */,
  "upstream_gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the upstream gene */,
  "distance" INTEGER /* Distance to the upstream gene */,
  "upstream_gene_description" TEXT /* Description of the upstream gene */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upstream_gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_upstream_genes_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES variants ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "downstream_genes" (
  "downstream_gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each downstream gene */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variant that includes the downstream gene */,
  "downstream_gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the downstream gene */,
  "distance" INTEGER /* Distance to the downstream gene */,
  "downstream_gene_description" TEXT /* Description of the downstream gene */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("downstream_gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_downstream_genes_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES variants ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "snp_gene_ids" (
  "snp_gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SNP-gene ID */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variant that includes the SNP-gene ID */,
  "snp_gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the SNP-gene ID */,
  "snp_gene_description" TEXT /* Description of the SNP-gene ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("snp_gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_snp_gene_ids_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES variants ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_genotyping_technology" (
  "study_genotyping_technology_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study-genotyping technology relationship */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "genotyping_technology_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genotyping technology */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_genotyping_technology_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_genotyping_technology_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_genotyping_technology_genotyping_technology_id FOREIGN KEY ("genotyping_technology_id") REFERENCES genotyping_technology ("genotyping_technology_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_platforms" (
  "study_platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study-platform relationship */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_platform_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_platforms_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_platforms_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES platforms ("platform_id")
)
